title: Mythos Draft
subtitle: Forge your destiny in the arena of gods. Advanced drafting for Age of Mythology: Retold.
heroSubtitle: The ultimate drafting tool for competitive Age of Mythology. Strategize your bans, secure your gods, and conquer the maps.
waitingC1Map: Waiting for Captain 1 to select map...
thankYouForReporting: Thank you for helping us make Mythos Draft better.
bugPlaceholder: What happened? (e.g., 'The timer froze during Game 2')
bugInfoNote: Your lobby ID and browser info will be sent automatically to help us diagnose the issue.
prepareBattle: The gods have been chosen. Prepare for battle!
snakeDanceWarning: WARNING: Snake Dance map detected! Positions and colors have been adjusted for tournament balance.
waitingReady: Waiting for both players to be ready...
reportDesc: Both captains must report the same result to proceed.
conflict: Conflict detected! Both captains must agree on the winner.
confirmWinnerMsg: Are you sure about this result?
enterDraftName: Please enter a draft name first
wipNotice: Notice: This tool is currently in development (Work in Progress)
clearAllConfirm: This will permanently delete all draft history from your browser. This action cannot be undone.
contactAdmin: Results conflict persists. Please contact tournament administration.
identityDesc: To ensure draft security and prevent manipulation, you must sign in. Anonymous access is currently disabled by the administrator.
adminNote: Admin: Enable 'Anonymous' in Firebase Console to allow guest access.
patchNotesFooter: Thank you for using Mythos Draft Tool!
patch_v1_0_1_item1: Professional Broadcast Tools: HD animated backgrounds, HUD scaling (50%-120%), and anchored scoreboard for perfect framing.
patch_v1_0_1_item2: MCL & Admin Suite: Advanced controls including Force Reset/Finish and a new 'Reset Current Game' to remake drafts safely.
patch_v1_0_1_item3: High-Accuracy Timer: Switched to Web Workers and Server Sync so the clock never desyncs, even when minimized.
patch_v1_0_1_item4: Architectural Guard: Implemented 'isProcessing' locks and fallback auto-picks to prevent stalls and double-action errors.
patch_v1_0_1_item5: UI & Mobile Polish: Sticky middle-screen timer, responsive mobile layouts, and a dedicated read-only banner for spectators.
patch_v1_0_1_item6: Robust Session Recovery: Host and Guest sessions are now stored locally; refreshing the page restores your captaincy.
patch_v1_0_1_item7: Enhanced Replay System: Interactive sequence logs with auto-scrolling and live Map Visualizer integration.
patch_v1_0_1_item8: Visual Refinements: Grayscale post-victory effects, high-resolution card exports, and optimistic 'Ready' states.
patch_v1_0_1_item9: Global Localization: The entire tool (HUD, Labels, Notes) is now fully localized in 9 languages.
patch_v1_0_2_item1: Database Indexing: New metadata system for public drafts, reducing database read costs by over 90% when spectating.
patch_v1_0_2_item2: HUD Realignment: Streamer HUD default scale reduced from 85% to 75% for a cleaner broadcast layout.
patch_v1_0_2_item3: OBS Deep-Linking: Copying the OBS link now automatically appends scale parameters to ensure broadcast consistency.
patch_v1_0_2_item4: Image Resilience: Improved external asset loading with global proxy and refined referer policies for God and Map images.
patch_v1_0_2_item5: Fortress Security: Completely overhauled Firestore security rules to protect against unauthorized writes and identity spoofing.
patch_v1_0_2_item6: Optimization Polish: Refined Map Visualizer performance and fixed layout flickering during high-latency transitions.
patch_v1_0_2_item7: MCL Compatibility: Updated MCL presets to reflect the latest tournament map pools and competitive rulesets.
patch_v1_0_2_item8: Roster Stability: Enhanced session recovery for Captains to prevent accidental lockouts during page refreshes.
patch_v1_0_2_item9: UI Consistency: Fixed 'God Picker' alignment issues and improved mobile responsiveness for the drafting screens.
patch_v1_0_2_item10: Draft Remake: Smoother 'Reset Game' flow for remaking matches without losing lobby data.
patch_v1_0_2_item11: Discord Admin Tool: New administrative webhook integration to push draft results and alerts directly to Discord channels.
supportDesc: Development costs are around $1.00/day. Any help keeps the Divine Connection active and free for everyone!
selectYourGod: Select your god for the next match
godPickerNote: Select one of your previously drafted gods to play in the next match. Used gods cannot be picked again.
shareResultMsg: Share the result with your friends!
godPickerNoteGroup: Picks are hidden and will be revealed simultaneously once both players have confirmed. You can pick any god from the allowed pool.
systemPickingMap: SYSTEM IS SELECTING A RANDOM MAP...
gameInProgressDesc: Now play the match and return here only after the game ends. DO NOT CLOSE THE DRAFT LINK!
changePlayersDesc: Change players or positions for the next game
enemyRosterChanged: The enemy team has changed their roster!
selectPlayerForGod: Select a player for this God
acePickDesc: Hidden or showed first pick before any ban phase.
inviteDesc: Share this link with your opponent to start the draft.
joinDesc: Enter your team details to join the draft.
shareInviteDesc: Share this link with the other captain to start the draft.
readyNextGameDesc: Confirm readiness to start the next game.
readyForPickerDesc: God pool drafted. Get ready to pick your god for the current map.
bannedComboDesc: The Hamadryad + SS tactic is banned from the MCL championship. Your current composition (Ra/Set + Demeter) violates this rule and may result in disqualification.
requestResetMsg: This will pause the draft and ask your opponent for a reset of the current game only. Series progress will be saved. Do you want to proceed?
requestedResetDesc: has requested to reset the current game draft due to a mistake.
yourRequestSent: Your request has been sent to the opponent
bothLeft: Both players have left the draft.
mclTournamentDesc: 3 games, map 1 host/guest choice, map 2 guest/host choice, map 3 pre determined by the round. 0 map/god bans, non-exclusive god picks (same god allowed on both teams).
selectPosition: Select your position on the map
snakeDraftDesc: God picks use the snake pattern (1-2-2-1) for balance.
standardDraftDesc: God picks use the snake pattern (1-2-2-1) for balance.
acePickInfo: Ace Pick happens before bans, allowing a 'signature' god choice.
searchPlaceholder: Search by name, player or ID...
showingRecent: Showing the 20 most recent public drafts. Use search to find older ones.
searchingAll: Searching through all available public drafts.
customStepsDesc: Add steps below to override the default turn order logic.
presetActiveWarning: A preset is active. Manual selection is locked to ensure rules integrity.
